name: get_product_details
description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific product including available variants, sizes, colors, and pricing. Use this to understand what options are available before creating orders.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The Printful catalog product ID to retrieve details for.

product.title: Unisex Staple T-Shirt | Bella + Canvas 3001
product.description: This premium t-shirt is made of 100% combed and ring-spun cotton.
